SEARCH
程序包 LoginPage

类 Module

java.lang.Object
LoginPage.Module
public class Module extends Object
Entity class representing a teaching module (course). Stores module metadata and its current status in the approval workflow.

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    Module(String moduleName, String responsibilities, String requirements, int positions, String deadline, String status)
    Constructs a Module with all fields.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Module

      public Module(String moduleName, String responsibilities, String requirements, int positions, String deadline, String status)
      Constructs a Module with all fields.
      参数:
      moduleName - unique module identifier (e.g. "CS101")
      responsibilities - description of TA responsibilities
      requirements - required skills/qualifications for TA applicants
      positions - maximum number of TA positions available
      deadline - application deadline (YYYY-MM-DD)
      status - current workflow status (e.g. "Pending Review", "Approved")
